name: Performance Food Group Co
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Performance Food Group Company, through its subsidiaries, markets and distributes more than 250,000 food and food-related products to customers across North America, from our 155 distribution centers to over 300,000 customer locations in the food-away-from-home industry.
